recommendations.title: Secret Admirer
recommendations.overview: An anonymous love letter left in Michael Ryan's locker on the last day of school wreaks havoc on his life and the lives of everyone who comes in contact with it.

recommendations.title: The Open House
recommendations.overview: A teenager and his mother find themselves besieged by threatening forces when they move into a new house.

recommendations.title: Goodbye June
recommendations.overview: Four siblings' lives change drastically when their ailing mother takes a turn for the worse over the holiday season.

recommendations.title: The Gingerdead Man
recommendations.overview: An evil yet adorable Gingerbread man comes to life with the soul of a convicted killer, and this real life cookie monster wreaks havoc on the girl who sent the killer to the electric chair.

recommendations.title: The Goldsmith
recommendations.overview: Determined to rob a goldsmith, three young robbers break into his country house. The man and his wife turn out to be less defenseless than they seem.

recommendations.title: Hell Baby
recommendations.overview: After she and her husband move into a haunted house, a woman gives birth to a demonic infant that wreaks havoc.

recommendations.title: Eden Lake
recommendations.overview: When a young couple goes to a remote wooded lake for a romantic getaway, their quiet weekend is shattered by an aggressive group of local kids. Rowdiness quickly turns to rage as the teens terrorize the couple in unimaginable ways, and a weekend outi

recommendations.title: Black Sabbath
recommendations.overview: Three tales of supernatural horror include a woman plagued by threatening phone calls, a family targeted by vampiric monsters, and a deceased medium who wreaks havoc upon the living.

recommendations.title: Pod
recommendations.overview: A family intervention goes horrifically awry within the snowy confines of an isolated lake house.

recommendations.title: Bloody Hell
recommendations.overview: A man with a mysterious past flees the country to escape his own personal hell... only to arrive somewhere much worse. In an effort to survive this new horror, he turns to his personified conscience.
